case_title: RHODMAN, WYLLIE vs. WALGREEN CO. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODMAN, WYLLIE AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. DOES 1 TO INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-30-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-10-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT RECEIVED BY THE COURT ON 10/30/95 - BUT BACK DATED TO 10/13/95 DUE TO COURT'S STAMP OF THAT DATE ON PLTF'S COPY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODMAN, WYLLIE

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE OF WITNESS AT DEPOSITION, CALENDAR OF FEB-27-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLAINTIFF TOMAPPEAR FOR A NEW DEPOSITION DATE & PAY $250.00 IN SANCTIONS IN 20 DAYS; NO OPPOSITION.
CHANGE OF LAW FIRM NAME - PLTF - WYLLIE RHODMAN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIER OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS
